statements.note: Core transformation logic — all non-identity columns populated via CTE + main SELECT

writer_analysis.logic_summary: Full reload via TRUNCATE + INSERT. CTE (GR_RunningTotal) computes per-PO-line running cumulative received quantity using SUM OVER window function ordered by ReceiptDate/GRID/GRLineID, filtered to Posted receipts. Main SELECT joins goods receipts, PO lines/headers, vendors, items, employees from PTP_System and resolves surrogate keys against DW dimensions with ISNULL defaults. Key derived measures: Lead_Time_Days (DATEDIFF PODate to ReceiptDate), Delivery_Variance_Days (DATEDIFF ExpectedDelivery to ReceiptDate, nullable when no expected date), Receipt_Completeness_Pct (cumulative/ordered*100), Quantity_Outstanding. Location surrogate resolved via rule-based CASE on ItemCategory (Office→WH-SUPP-03, Hardware SWITCH→WH-NET-04, Hardware→WH-IT-02, else WH-CORP-01).

classification.rationale: The table tracks the accumulating fulfillment state of each goods receipt line against its PO line, storing cumulative measures (Cumulative_Qty_Received, Quantity_Outstanding, Receipt_Completeness_Pct) that evolve as more receipts arrive. Although implemented as a TRUNCATE + full reload, the semantic grain and measure design match an accumulating snapshot tracking progress of a multi-step business process (PO to receipts to fulfilment) over time.

primary_key.rationale: Catalog declares PK_Fact_Receipt on Fact_Receipt_SK, which is an IDENTITY BIGINT column — a definitive surrogate key confirmed by both the primary_keys and auto_increment_columns catalog signals.

natural_key.rationale: Fact_Receipt_SK is an identity surrogate; the natural grain identifier is the goods receipt number (GR_BK) combined with the product (Product_SK), representing one receipt line per product per GR event, as the source system GRLineID is not persisted in the fact table.

watermark.rationale: The proc performs a full TRUNCATE + reload with no incremental WHERE clause; DW_Load_DateTime (DATETIME2 NOT NULL) is the only datetime column on the fact table itself and serves as the dbt incremental watermark. Recommended dbt strategy: microbatch or merge.

foreign_keys.rationale: Two fact columns (ReceiptDate_SK and ExpectedDelivery_SK) both join Dim_Date in different date roles; ReceiptDate_SK carries the actual receipt date role.
Two fact columns (ReceiptDate_SK and ExpectedDelivery_SK) both join Dim_Date in different date roles; ExpectedDelivery_SK carries the expected delivery date role.
Single fact column joining one dimension key with no multi-role pattern; the writer proc resolves Vendor_SK via a single LEFT JOIN on Vendor_BK.
Single fact column joining one dimension key with no multi-role pattern; the writer proc resolves Product_SK via a single LEFT JOIN on Product_BK.
Single fact column joining one dimension key with no multi-role pattern; the writer proc resolves Location_SK via a rule-based LEFT JOIN on Location_BK derived from item category.
Single fact column joining one dimension key with no multi-role pattern; the writer proc resolves ReceivedBy_Employee_SK via a single LEFT JOIN on Employee_BK.
GR_BK (GRNumber, VARCHAR(20)) is a business key stored directly in the fact table with no corresponding dimension join target; it functions as a degenerate dimension for filtering and drill-through.

PO_BK (PONumber, VARCHAR(20)) is a business key stored directly in the fact table with no corresponding dimension join target; it functions as a degenerate dimension for PO-level grouping and drill-through.

refactor.extracted_sql: -- Extracted SELECT for dbo.Fact_Inventory_Receipt -- Source: etl.usp_Load_Fact_Inventory_Receipt -- Pattern: full-reload proc; the original DML is replaced by this pure SELECT -- The GR_RunningTotal CTE is preserved as-is (window function over source tables) WITH GR_RunningTotal AS ( SELECT grl.GRLineID, grl.GRID, grl.POLineID, grl.QuantityReceived, SUM(grl.QuantityReceived) OVER ( PARTITION BY grl.POLineID ORDER BY gr_inner.ReceiptDate ASC, gr_inner.GRID ASC, grl.GRLineID ASC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW ) AS CumulativeQtyReceived FROM PTP_System.Purchasing.GoodsReceiptLines grl INNER JOIN PTP_System.Purchasing.GoodsReceipts gr_inner ON gr_inner.GRID = grl.GRID WHERE gr_inner.GRStatus = 'Posted' ) SELECT gr.GRNumber AS GR_BK, po.PONumber AS PO_BK, ISNULL(d_rcv.Date_SK, 0) AS ReceiptDate_SK, ISNULL(d_exp.Date_SK, 0) AS ExpectedDelivery_SK, ISNULL(vnd.Vendor_SK, -1) AS Vendor_SK, ISNULL(prod.Product_SK,-1) AS Product_SK, ISNULL(loc.Location_SK,-1) AS Location_SK, ISNULL(emp.Employee_SK,-1) AS ReceivedBy_Employee_SK, gr.GRStatus, pol.Quantity AS Quantity_Ordered, run.QuantityReceived AS Quantity_This_Receipt, run.CumulativeQtyReceived AS Cumulative_Qty_Received, CAST(pol.Quantity - run.CumulativeQtyReceived AS DECIMAL(10,3)) AS Quantity_Outstanding, CAST((run.CumulativeQtyReceived / pol.Quantity) * 100 AS DECIMAL(5,2)) AS Receipt_Completeness_Pct, DATEDIFF(DAY, po.PODate, gr.ReceiptDate) AS Lead_Time_Days, CASE WHEN po.ExpectedDelivery IS NOT NULL THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, po.ExpectedDelivery, gr.ReceiptDate) ELSE NULL END AS Delivery_Variance_Days FROM GR_RunningTotal run INNER JOIN PTP_System.Purchasing.GoodsReceiptLines grl ON grl.GRLineID = run.GRLineID INNER JOIN PTP_System.Purchasing.GoodsReceipts gr ON gr.GRID = run.GRID INNER JOIN PTP_System.Purchasing.PurchaseOrderLines pol ON pol.POLineID = run.POLineID INNER JOIN PTP_System.Purchasing.PurchaseOrders po ON po.POID = pol.POID INNER JOIN PTP_System.Master.Vendors src_vnd ON src_vnd.VendorID = po.VendorID INNER JOIN PTP_System.Master.Items src_itm ON src_itm.ItemID = pol.ItemID INNER JOIN PTP_System.Master.Employees src_emp ON src_emp.EmployeeID = gr.ReceivedByID LEFT JOIN dbo.Dim_Date d_rcv ON d_rcv.Date_SK = CAST(FORMAT(gr.ReceiptDate, 'yyyyMMdd') AS INT) LEFT JOIN dbo.Dim_Date d_exp ON d_exp.Date_SK = CAST(FORMAT(po.ExpectedDelivery, 'yyyyMMdd') AS INT) LEFT JOIN dbo.Dim_Vendor vnd ON vnd.Vendor_BK = src_vnd.VendorCode AND vnd.IsCurrent = 1 LEFT JOIN dbo.Dim_Product prod ON prod.Product_BK = src_itm.ItemCode AND prod.IsCurrent = 1 LEFT JOIN dbo.Dim_Employee emp ON emp.Employee_BK = src_emp.EmployeeCode AND emp.IsCurrent = 1 LEFT JOIN dbo.Dim_Location loc ON loc.Location_BK = CASE WHEN src_itm.ItemCategory = 'Office' THEN 'WH-SUPP-03' WHEN src_itm.ItemCategory = 'Hardware' AND src_itm.ItemCode LIKE '%SWITCH%' THEN 'WH-NET-04' WHEN src_itm.ItemCategory = 'Hardware' THEN 'WH-IT-02' ELSE 'WH-CORP-01' END AND loc.IsCurrent = 1 WHERE gr.GRStatus = 'Posted'
refactor.refactored_sql: -- Refactored CTE version of dbo.Fact_Inventory_Receipt -- Pattern: import / logical / final -- Source: etl.usp_Load_Fact_Inventory_Receipt WITH -- ============================================================ -- IMPORT CTEs: one per source table -- ============================================================ source_gr_lines AS ( SELECT * FROM [PTP_System].[Purchasing].[GoodsReceiptLines] ), source_gr AS ( SELECT * FROM [PTP_System].[Purchasing].[GoodsReceipts] ), source_po_lines AS ( SELECT * FROM [PTP_System].[Purchasing].[PurchaseOrderLines] ), source_po AS ( SELECT * FROM [PTP_System].[Purchasing].[PurchaseOrders] ), source_vendors AS ( SELECT * FROM [PTP_System].[Master].[Vendors] ), source_items AS ( SELECT * FROM [PTP_System].[Master].[Items] ), source_employees AS ( SELECT * FROM [PTP_System].[Master].[Employees] ), dim_date AS ( SELECT * FROM [dbo].[Dim_Date] ), dim_vendor AS ( SELECT * FROM [dbo].[Dim_Vendor] ), dim_product AS ( SELECT * FROM [dbo].[Dim_Product] ), dim_employee AS ( SELECT * FROM [dbo].[Dim_Employee] ), dim_location AS ( SELECT * FROM [dbo].[Dim_Location] ), -- ============================================================ -- LOGICAL CTEs -- ============================================================ -- Running cumulative received quantity per PO line, -- ordered by receipt date and GR primary key (Posted receipts only) gr_running_total AS ( SELECT grl.GRLineID, grl.GRID, grl.POLineID, grl.QuantityReceived, SUM(grl.QuantityReceived) OVER ( PARTITION BY grl.POLineID ORDER BY gr_inner.ReceiptDate ASC, gr_inner.GRID ASC, grl.GRLineID ASC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW ) AS CumulativeQtyReceived FROM source_gr_lines grl INNER JOIN source_gr gr_inner ON gr_inner.GRID = grl.GRID WHERE gr_inner.GRStatus = 'Posted' ), -- Resolve item-to-location mapping rule item_location_bk AS ( SELECT itm.ItemID, itm.ItemCode, itm.ItemCategory, CASE WHEN itm.ItemCategory = 'Office' THEN 'WH-SUPP-03' WHEN itm.ItemCategory = 'Hardware' AND itm.ItemCode LIKE '%SWITCH%' THEN 'WH-NET-04' WHEN itm.ItemCategory = 'Hardware' THEN 'WH-IT-02' ELSE 'WH-CORP-01' END AS Location_BK FROM source_items itm ), -- Join source transactional tables receipts_joined AS ( SELECT run.GRLineID, run.QuantityReceived, run.CumulativeQtyReceived, gr.GRNumber, gr.GRStatus, gr.ReceiptDate, gr.ReceivedByID, pol.POLineID, pol.Quantity AS Quantity_Ordered, pol.ItemID, po.POID, po.PONumber, po.PODate, po.ExpectedDelivery, po.VendorID FROM gr_running_total run INNER JOIN source_gr_lines grl ON grl.GRLineID = run.GRLineID INNER JOIN source_gr gr ON gr.GRID = run.GRID INNER JOIN source_po_lines pol ON pol.POLineID = run.POLineID INNER JOIN source_po po ON po.POID = pol.POID WHERE gr.GRStatus = 'Posted' ), -- Attach source vendor and employee for dimension lookups receipts_with_dims AS ( SELECT rj.*, src_vnd.VendorCode, src_itm.ItemCode, src_itm.ItemCategory, ilbk.Location_BK, src_emp.EmployeeCode FROM receipts_joined rj INNER JOIN source_vendors src_vnd ON src_vnd.VendorID = rj.VendorID INNER JOIN source_items src_itm ON src_itm.ItemID = rj.ItemID INNER JOIN item_location_bk ilbk ON ilbk.ItemID = rj.ItemID INNER JOIN source_employees src_emp ON src_emp.EmployeeID = rj.ReceivedByID ), -- ============================================================ -- FINAL CTE: produce all target columns -- ============================================================ final AS ( SELECT rwd.GRNumber AS GR_BK, rwd.PONumber AS PO_BK, -- Date surrogate keys ISNULL(d_rcv.Date_SK, 0) AS ReceiptDate_SK, ISNULL(d_exp.Date_SK, 0) AS ExpectedDelivery_SK, -- Conformed dimension surrogate keys ISNULL(vnd.Vendor_SK, -1) AS Vendor_SK, ISNULL(prod.Product_SK,-1) AS Product_SK, ISNULL(loc.Location_SK,-1) AS Location_SK, ISNULL(emp.Employee_SK,-1) AS ReceivedBy_Employee_SK, rwd.GRStatus, -- Quantity measures rwd.Quantity_Ordered AS Quantity_Ordered, rwd.QuantityReceived AS Quantity_This_Receipt, rwd.CumulativeQtyReceived AS Cumulative_Qty_Received, CAST(rwd.Quantity_Ordered - rwd.CumulativeQtyReceived AS DECIMAL(10,3)) AS Quantity_Outstanding, CAST((rwd.CumulativeQtyReceived / rwd.Quantity_Ordered) * 100 AS DECIMAL(5,2)) AS Receipt_Completeness_Pct, -- KPIs DATEDIFF(DAY, rwd.PODate, rwd.ReceiptDate) AS Lead_Time_Days, CASE WHEN rwd.ExpectedDelivery IS NOT NULL THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, rwd.ExpectedDelivery, rwd.ReceiptDate) ELSE NULL END AS Delivery_Variance_Days FROM receipts_with_dims rwd -- Date dimension lookups LEFT JOIN dim_date d_rcv ON d_rcv.Date_SK = CAST(FORMAT(rwd.ReceiptDate, 'yyyyMMdd') AS INT) LEFT JOIN dim_date d_exp ON d_exp.Date_SK = CAST(FORMAT(rwd.ExpectedDelivery, 'yyyyMMdd') AS INT) -- Conformed dimension lookups LEFT JOIN dim_vendor vnd ON vnd.Vendor_BK = rwd.VendorCode AND vnd.IsCurrent = 1 LEFT JOIN dim_product prod ON prod.Product_BK = rwd.ItemCode AND prod.IsCurrent = 1 LEFT JOIN dim_employee emp ON emp.Employee_BK = rwd.EmployeeCode AND emp.IsCurrent = 1 LEFT JOIN dim_location loc ON loc.Location_BK = rwd.Location_BK AND loc.IsCurrent = 1 ) SELECT * FROM final
